languages.text: Ветви растения настолько острые, что один взгляд на них вызывает неприятное покалывание в ладонях.
The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.
languages.original_text: Ветви растения настолько острые, что один взгляд на них вызывает неприятное покалывание в ладонях.

traits.locale_text: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.
The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.
The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.

languages.text: Las ramas de la planta son tan afiladas que basta mirarlas para que te entre un cosquilleo desagradable en la palma de las manos.
languages.original_text: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.

traits.locale_text: Las ramas de la planta son tan afiladas que basta mirarlas para que te entre un cosquilleo desagradable en la palma de las manos.

languages.text: 那植物的枝条锋利得吓人，光是看上一眼，就让你掌心一阵发麻。
languages.original_text: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.

traits.locale_text: 那植物的枝条锋利得吓人，光是看上一眼，就让你掌心一阵发麻。

languages.text: Les branches de la plante sont si acérées qu'il vous suffit de la regarder pour ressentir des picotements désagréables dans les mains.
languages.original_text: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.

traits.locale_text: Les branches de la plante sont si acérées qu'il vous suffit de la regarder pour ressentir des picotements désagréables dans les mains.

languages.text: Bitkinin dalları o kadar keskin ki onlara sadece bakmanla avuç içlerin, hoş olmayan bir şekilde karıncalanmaya başlıyor.
languages.original_text: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.

traits.locale_text: Bitkinin dalları o kadar keskin ki onlara sadece bakmanla avuç içlerin, hoş olmayan bir şekilde karıncalanmaya başlıyor.

languages.text: この植物の枝は非常に鋭く、見るだけで手のひらに不快な感覚が走る。
languages.original_text: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.

traits.locale_text: この植物の枝は非常に鋭く、見るだけで手のひらに不快な感覚が走る。

languages.text: Die Äste der Pflanze sind so scharf, dass deine Handflächen allein bei ihrem Anblick unangenehm jucken.
languages.original_text: The branches of the plant are so sharp that one look at them causes your palms to tingle unpleasantly.

traits.locale_text: Die Äste der Pflanze sind so scharf, dass deine Handflächen allein bei ihrem Anblick unangenehm jucken.
